title: Meridian European Small Cap Fund
content:
MERIDIAN EUROPEAN SMALL CAP FUND - PRODUCT FACTSHEET

Fund Overview:
The Meridian European Small Cap Fund (ISIN: LU2845673920) is an actively managed UCITS equity fund targeting small capitalization companies across European markets. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by investing primarily in companies with market capitalizations between €50 million and €2.5 billion domiciled in EU member states, Switzerland, Norway, and the United Kingdom.

Investment Strategy:
Our portfolio managers employ a fundamental bottom-up approach, focusing on companies demonstrating strong earnings growth potential, innovative business models, and sustainable competitive advantages. The fund maintains concentrated exposure with typically 45-65 holdings across diversified sectors including technology, healthcare, industrial goods, and consumer discretionary. Geographic allocation targets 35-45% in core European markets (Germany, France, Netherlands), 25-35% in Nordic countries, and 20-30% in peripheral European markets.

Risk Profile and MiFID II Considerations:
This product carries an aggressive risk classification with a Synthetic Risk and Reward Indicator (SRRI) of 6 out of 7. Under MiFID II Article 25 suitability requirements, advisors must assess client knowledge, experience, and risk tolerance before recommending this fund. The product is suitable for experienced investors with high risk tolerance and investment horizons exceeding 5 years. Key risks include concentration risk, currency fluctuation, liquidity constraints in small-cap securities, and heightened volatility during market downturns.

Performance Metrics (as of last review):
Since inception (March 2019), the fund has delivered an annualized return of 8.7% versus the MSCI Europe Small Cap Index benchmark return of 6.2%. Year-to-date performance stands at 12.4% (EUR terms) with a maximum drawdown of -28.3% during the March 2020 market correction. The fund's Sharpe ratio of 0.61 demonstrates reasonable risk-adjusted returns, though volatility remains elevated at 19.8% annualized.

Cost Structure and UCITS Compliance:
The fund operates under UCITS Directive framework with an ongoing charges figure (OCF) of 1.85% annually. Performance fees apply above the high-water mark with a 15% rate on outperformance versus benchmark, subject to a 2% annual cap. Minimum initial investment is €25,000 for institutional share class (I-EUR), with subsequent investments from €5,000. The fund maintains UCITS-compliant diversification limits with maximum 10% exposure to any single issuer and 40% maximum in any single country.

Liquidity and Operational Details:
Daily dealing with T+3 settlement through European clearing systems. The fund typically maintains 3-5% cash allocation for redemption management, though liquidity can be constrained during volatile periods due to underlying small-cap holdings. Redemption gates may be applied under exceptional circumstances as permitted under UCITS regulations.

Suitability Assessment:
This product requires comprehensive suitability assessment under MiFID II guidelines. Target investor profile includes sophisticated clients with minimum €500,000 investable assets, previous equity fund experience, and capacity to withstand significant short-term losses. Not suitable for capital preservation strategies or clients requiring regular income generation.

Regulatory Status:
The fund maintains full UCITS compliance and is registered for distribution across 24 EU member states. Regular stress testing and risk monitoring procedures ensure adherence to regulatory frameworks and internal risk parameters.
